# YOUR CODE HERE
def main():
    import sys
    input = sys.stdin.read
    data = input().split()
    N = int(data[0])
    P = list(map(int, data[1:N+1]))
    
    max_p = max(P[1:])  # Find the maximum of others in one pass
    if P[0] > max_p:
        print(0)
    else:
        print(max_p - P[0] + 1)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
